events.name: resource_strike
events.description: Ice deposits discovered beneath the eastern ridge.

events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.

events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.

meta_awareness.insight: Ora Flame dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.

memories.event: Repeating pattern in cosmic ray data — statistical fluke or message?
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Subsurface water table detected by ground-penetrating radar.
Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.
Regolith dust causes chronic respiratory inflammation.
Ice deposits discovered beneath the eastern ridge.
The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.
Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.
Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.
Video letters from family arrive after 22-minute delay.
